programme.title: Words And Pictures
programme.desc: An english and art teacher prove if words or pictures are more important. 2013. USA, Canada, Australia. Director: Fred Schepisi. Starring: Clive Owen, Juliette Binoche, Bruce Davison.

programme.title: Stress Positions
programme.desc: Terry isolates himself in his ex-husband's house while caring for his nephew after an e-scooter accident. 2024. United States. Director: Theda Hammel. Starring: John Early, Qaher Harhash.

programme.title: Poor Cow
programme.desc: After the arrest of her abusive husband, Joy must come to terms with the choices she has made. 1967. UK. Director: Ken Loach. Starring: Terence Stamp, Carol White, John Bindon.

programme.title: Young Werther
programme.desc: Despite her engagement, Werther turns his life upside-down to win Charlotte's heart. 2024. Canada. Director: Jose Avelino Gilles Corbett Lourenco. Starring: Patrick J. Adams, Alison Pill.

programme.title: The Food Club: Home Again
programme.desc: We reunite with three life-long friends, food, friendship and new challenges await. 2025. Denmark. Director: Charlotte Sachs Bostrup. Starring: Rasmus Botoft, Helle Dolleris.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/1. The discovery of a mass grave near Poland's border uncovers a decade long murder spree. 2022. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Julius Gause, Robert Glatzeder.

programme.title: Antidote
programme.desc: In this urgently topical documentary, a whistle blowers from inside Russia's poison program risks his life to expose Vladimir Putin's authoritarian regime. 2024. USA. Director: James Jones.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/1. The media's eyes are on Knutby after the murder. Eva's grip tightens around the congregation. 2024. Sweden. Director: Goran Kapetanovic. Starring: Aliette Opheim, Alexander Jubell.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/2. Orjan climbs the congregate's ladder, landing him the role of Jesus in a Eva's musical. 2024. Sweden. Director: Goran Kapetanovic. Starring: Sara Alexandersson, Edvin Bredefeldt.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/3. Orjan tells Lillian God wants her to give herself to him, and Peter's premonition shakes Knutby. 2024. Sweden. Director: Goran Kapetanovic. Starring: Sara Alexandersson, Davin Amini.

programme.title: Caravaggio's Shadow
programme.desc: Caravaggio's verdict rests on the Pope's decision to grant him clemency for killing a rival. 2022. Italy, France. Director: Michele Placido. Starring: Riccardo Scamarcio, Louis Garrel.

programme.title: Truelove
programme.desc: 1/1. After a friend's funeral a pact between mates is made to offer a more dignified death. 2024. UK. Directors: Carl Tibbetts, Chloe Wicks. Starring: Lindsay Duncan, Clarke Peters, Fiona Button.

programme.title: Truelove
programme.desc: 1/2. Tom's body washes to shore with his boat, police suspect foul play. 2024. UK. Directors: Carl Tibbetts, Chloe Wicks. Starring: Lindsay Duncan, Clarke Peters, Fiona Button.

programme.title: Words And Pictures
programme.desc: An english and art teacher prove if words or pictures are more important. 2013. USA, Canada, Australia. Director: Fred Schepisi. Starring: Clive Owen, Juliette Binoche, Bruce Davison.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A young Jewish boy forcibly kidnapped by order of the cardinal. 2023. Italy, France. Director: Marco Bellocchio. Starring: Paolo Pierobon, Fausto Russo Alesi.

programme.title: The Glory Of Life
programme.desc: The last year in Franz Kafka's life and its surprising love story. 2024. Germany. Director: Judith Kaufmann, Georg Maas. Starring: Henriette Confurius, Sabin Tambrea, Manuel Rubey.

programme.title: Before What Comes After
programme.desc: Doctor Augustin Masset opens dialogue with writer Fabrice Toussaint about the nuance of life and death. 2025. France. Director: Costa-Garvas. Starring: Denis Podalydes, Kad Merad.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/2. Maggie believes that the truth lies in her and her childhood-friend Adrian's shared past. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Maximilian Ehrenreich, Julius Gause.

programme.title: Lingui, The Sacred Bonds
programme.desc: Amina discovers that her 14-year-old daughter Maria is pregnant. 2021. Chad, France. Director: Mahamat-Saleh Haroun. Starring: Achouackh Abakar Souleymane, Rihane Khalil Alio.

programme.title: The Bibi Files
programme.desc: Uncover the corruption charges against the Israeli Prime Minister through leaked polic interrogation videos. 2024. USA. Director: Alexis Bloom.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/4. Rumours spread about Eva, and Orjan takes on a bigger role in preparing for Christ's return. 2024. Sweden. Director: Patrik Gyllstrom. Starring: Aliette Opheim, Alexander Jubell.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/5. Irma was wrong, and Orjan must maintain order as even Lillian starts to question her role. 2024. Sweden. Director: Patrik Gyllstrom. Starring: Aliette Opheim, Alexander Jubell.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/6. Eva is confronted about Orjan before she goes to Seville for a conference. 2024. Sweden. Director: Goran Kapetanovic. Starring: Aliette Opheim, Sara Alexandersson.

programme.title: Godland
programme.desc: Danish Priest pilgrimiges to build a church in remote Iceland. 2022. Denmark, Iceland. Director: Hlynur Palmason. Starring: Elliott Crosset Hove, Ingvar Sigurdsson, Vic Carmen Sonne.

programme.title: Truelove
programme.desc: 1/3. Marion's health deterioates, Phil asks Ken to commit an act of 'true love'. 2024. UK. Directors: Carl Tibbetts, Chloe Wicks. Starring: Lindsay Duncan, Clarke Peters, Fiona Button.

programme.desc: 1/4. Phil and Ken rekindle their romance, meanwhile the police suspect their investigation is compromised. UK. 2024. Directors: Carl Tibbetts, Chloe Wick. Starring: Lindsay Duncan, Clarke Peters.
